zh.lifeSummary: 當Isaac Young Jr.於1698年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆時，他的父親Isaac Young Sr38歲，母親Susannah Galphin38歲。他於1720年與Mary Sarah Munce在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼艾利蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1757年在美國喬治亞謝佛遜享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Young
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: nickname from Middle English yong ‘young’ (Old English geong), used to distinguish a younger man from an older man bearing the same personal name (typically, father and son). In Middle English this name is often found with the Anglo-Norman French definite article, for example Robert le Yunge. In Gaelic-speaking areas of Scotland this was widely used as an English equivalent of the Gaelic nickname Og ‘young’; see Ogg . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘young’ or similar, notably German   Jung  , Dutch   Jong   and   De Jong  , and French   Lejeune   and   Lajeunesse  .
Americanized form of Swedish Ljung: topographic or an ornamental name from ljung ‘(field of) heather’, or a habitational name from a placename containing this word, e.g. Ljungby.

variants.name: Yongue
meanings: English: variant of   Young  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of Dutch   De Jonge  .

variants.name: Youngs
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Young , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Younger
meanings: English (mainly Northumberland and eastern Scotland): from Middle English yungre ‘younger’, comparative of Young , used to distinguish a younger man from an older man bearing the same personal name (typically, father and son). In one case, at least, however, the name is known to have been borne by an immigrant Fleming, and was probably an Americanized form of Middle Dutch jongheer ‘young nobleman’ (see Jonker ).
Americanized form of various cognate or like-sounding names in other languages, notably German   Junger   and   Junker  , or Dutch   Jonker  .

variants.name: Ogg
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of a nickname from the Gaelic adjective óg ‘young’, used to distinguish the junior of two bearers of the same personal name (typically, father and son).
English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Hogg  , pronounced without initial /h/.

variants.name: Younge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Fitzroy, Sinead.

English: variant of   Young  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 823, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Isaac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the son of Abraham, who was nearly sacrificed by his father according to a command of God which was changed at the last moment. A ram, caught in a nearby thicket, was sacrificed instead (Genesis 22:1–13). Isaac lived on to marry Rebecca and become the father of Esau and Jacob. The derivation of the name is not certain; it has traditionally been connected with the Hebrew verb meaning ‘to laugh’. It was borne by both Christians and Jews in the Middle Ages and was taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

historicEvents.description: Catholics hold just 7% of land in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Isaac Young Jr. was born in 1698, in County Antrim, Ireland, his father, Isaac Young Sr, was 38 and his mother, Susannah Galphin, was 38. He married Mary Sarah Munce in 1720, in Ireland, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1757, in Jefferson, Georgia, United States, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isaac Young Jr. est né en 1698, à County Antrim, Irlande, son père, Isaac Young Sr, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Susannah Galphin, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Mary Sarah Munce en 1720, à Ireland, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1757, à Jefferson, Géorgie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isaac Young Jr. 1698 in County Antrim, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Isaac Young Sr 38 und seine Mutter Susannah Galphin 38. Er hat 1720 in Ireland, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom Mary Sarah Munce geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1757 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Jefferson, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isaac Young Jr. è nato il nel 1698 nel County Antrim, Irlanda, il suo padre, Isaac Young Sr, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Susannah Galphin, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Mary Sarah Munce nel 1720, nel Ireland, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1757, nel Jefferson, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isaac Young Jr.が1698年にアイルランドコウントイ アントリムで生まれた時，父Isaac Young Srは38歳，母Susannah Galphinは38歳であった。1720年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーアイレランドでMary Sarah Munceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1757年にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州ジェフエルソンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isaac Young Jr.(이)가 1698년 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Isaac Young Sr(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Susannah Galphin(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1720년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 이렐랜드에서 Mary Sarah Munce(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1757년 미국 조지아 주 제퍼슨에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isaac Young Jr. родился в 1698 г. в местности коунти антрим, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Isaac Young Sr было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Susannah Galphin, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Sarah Munce в 1720 г. в местности иреланд, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1757 г. в местности джеффирсон, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 59 лет.
